name: fable
description: Get the most out of Claude Fable 5 — Fable architects, cheaper models execute. Plans, briefs, and verdicts stay with Fable; normal work delegates to GPT-5.6 Sol via headless codex (Opus 4.8 when Agent-tool mechanics are needed), light work to Sonnet 5. Fable executes only what's hard or high-stakes, or what the user asks it to.
